tasting_rooms.name: Bordeaux Wine School Tasting Bar
tasting_rooms.pricing: From EUR 20 per tasting flight; full WSET course packages from EUR 250
tasting_rooms.description: CIVB-affiliated Bordeaux Wine School city tasting bar next to the tourist office. Guided flights through appellations with bilingual sommeliers; retail purchasing available.

tasting_rooms.name: L'Intendant Tasting Room
tasting_rooms.pricing: Per-glass from EUR 6; vertical tasting flights from EUR 35
tasting_rooms.description: Bordeaux's iconic spiral-staircase wine tower with 15,000 references. Daily by-the-glass tastings span Medoc, Pessac-Leognan, Sauternes; vertical flights from EUR 35.

tasting_rooms.name: Le Wine Bar de la Cite du Vin
tasting_rooms.pricing: Included in Cite du Vin permanent exhibition ticket; extra flights from EUR 8
tasting_rooms.description: The 8th-floor Belvedere tasting bar at the Cite du Vin offers 360-degree Garonne panorama with rotating global wine flights, including a strong Bordeaux selections by the glass.

tasting_rooms.name: Maison du Vin de Saint-Emilion
tasting_rooms.pricing: Tasting flights from EUR 12; advance booking recommended in high season
tasting_rooms.description: The official Maison du Vin of the Saint-Emilion wine union offers structured flights of Grand Cru and Premier Grand Cru Classe wines, with bilingual staff and vineyard map resources.

tasting_rooms.name: Maison du Vin de Pauillac
tasting_rooms.address: La Verrerie, quai de Pouvourville, 33250 Pauillac, France
tasting_rooms.pricing: Tasting flights from EUR 15; first-growth flight available on request from EUR 40
tasting_rooms.description: The Pauillac wine union tasting room on the Gironde quayside. Covers the appellation's full range from fifth-growth value to premier cru flights with printed tasting notes.

verified.address_quoted: La Verrerie, quai de Pouvourville, 33250 Pauillac

tasting_rooms.name: Chateau Mouton Rothschild Visitor Centre
tasting_rooms.pricing: Museum entry EUR 12; tasting programs from EUR 35 by appointment
tasting_rooms.description: The world-renowned Museum of Wine in Art and the estate tasting room at Mouton Rothschild. Visits include the underground chai, label gallery, and tasting of current releases.

tasting_rooms.name: Chateau d'Yquem Tasting Experience
tasting_rooms.pricing: Tour and tasting packages from EUR 35; vertical tastings from EUR 120 by appointment
tasting_rooms.description: Guided estate tours at the world's most revered sweet wine estate. Visits include the botrytised vineyard parcels, historic chai and structured tasting of Yquem plus Y (dry white).

tasting_rooms.name: Chateau Smith Haut Lafitte Tasting Salon
tasting_rooms.address: Chateau Smith Haut Lafitte, 33650 Martillac, France
tasting_rooms.pricing: Cellar tours and tasting from EUR 25; vertical library tasting from EUR 80 by appointment
tasting_rooms.description: The tasting salon at Chateau Smith Haut Lafitte, combining Graves Cru Classe red and white flights with access to the Caudalie spa estate grounds. Premier Cuvee and white vertical programmes available.

verified.address_quoted: Chateau Smith Haut Lafitte, 33650 Martillac, France

tasting_rooms.name: Chateau de la Riviere Cave Tasting
tasting_rooms.address: Chateau de la Riviere, 33126 La Riviere, France
tasting_rooms.pricing: Cave tour and tasting from EUR 15; wine and cheese pairing experience EUR 35
tasting_rooms.description: Tours of Fronsac's most spectacular 16th-century underground limestone cave network at Chateau de la Riviere, followed by Fronsac AOC flights including reserve selections.

verified.address_quoted: Chateau de la Riviere, 33126 La Riviere, France

tasting_rooms.name: Bardin's Wine Bar Pessac
tasting_rooms.address: 236 avenue du Marechal de Lattre de Tassigny, 33600 Pessac, France
tasting_rooms.pricing: By the glass from EUR 5; Pessac-Leognan flights from EUR 22
tasting_rooms.description: Neighbourhood wine shop and tasting bar in Pessac specialising in Pessac-Leognan Crus Classes at cellar-door prices. Regular Saturday producer tastings and bottle retail.

verified.address_quoted: 236 avenue du Marechal de Lattre de Tassigny, 33600 Pessac
